mapper.select:
/** CmmtSurveyQuestionDao.selectList */ select
from cmmt_survey_question where survey_id = #{surveyId} order by question_no

/** CmmtSurveyQuestionDao.selectResultList */ select
,( select count(distinct member_id) from cmmt_survey_member_ans where survey_id = sq.survey_id and question_id = sq.question_id and created_dt between to_timestamp(#{beginDay},'YYYYMMDD') and to_timestamp(#{endDay} || '235959', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) as answerer_cnt from cmmt_survey_question sq where survey_id = #{surveyId} order by question_no
